title: Coinbase Builds Post-Quantum Custody System, Funds Bitcoin’s Crypto Upgrade
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Coinbase Builds Post-Quantum Custody System, Funds Bitcoin’s Crypto Upgrade

Coinbase says that while the threat isn't imminent, quantum may one day be able to break Bitcoin's cryptography.

This post Coinbase Builds Post-Quantum Custody System, Funds Bitcoin’s Crypto Upgrade first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

title: Kazakhstan Moves to Build a National Crypto Reserve Funded by Bitcoin Miners
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Kazakhstan Moves to Build a National Crypto Reserve Funded by Bitcoin Miners

Kazakhstan has laid out a plan to build a national strategic crypto reserve fed by its bitcoin miners, part of a two-step push by President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev to pull the country’s large mining industry into a regulated, state-supervised system. A presidential decree signed July 7 sets the frame, and a government resolution approved July 18 […]

This post Kazakhstan Moves to Build a National Crypto Reserve Funded by Bitcoin Miners first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Crypto Derivatives Exchange BitMEX To Shut Down in September
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Crypto Derivatives Exchange BitMEX To Shut Down in September

The exchange has told users to withdrawn funds as soon as they can.

title: BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy Among Nine Firms Launching the Bitcoin Security Consortium, Pledging $15 Million To BTC Security Development
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy Among Nine Firms Launching the Bitcoin Security Consortium, Pledging $15 Million To BTC Security Development

Nine major Bitcoin firms launched a consortium pledging $15 million to support Bitcoin security research and long-term resilience, including quantum readiness.

This post BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy Among Nine Firms Launching the Bitcoin Security Consortium, Pledging $15 Million To BTC Security Development first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Swiss Bank BancaStato Launches Bitcoin Trading Through Sygnum and Avaloq
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Swiss Bank BancaStato Launches Bitcoin Trading Through Sygnum and Avaloq

BancaStato has become the latest Swiss bank to offer regulated bitcoin trading through its existing banking apps via Sygnum's infrastructure.

This post Swiss Bank BancaStato Launches Bitcoin Trading Through Sygnum and Avaloq first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Nasdaq-listed Zhibao Technology to Take 3,500 Bitcoin in Proposed PIPE Financing
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Nasdaq-listed Zhibao Technology to Take 3,500 Bitcoin in Proposed PIPE Financing

Nasdaq-listed Zhibao Technology plans to accept 3,500 bitcoin in a proposed $220 million PIPE deal, a move that would transform the Chinese insurance-tech firm into the latest public company building a bitcoin treasury.

This post Nasdaq-listed Zhibao Technology to Take 3,500 Bitcoin in Proposed PIPE Financing first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
